# Shiru Extensions

Extensions for Shiru.

<a href="https://github.com/thejrossdev/Shiru-Extensions/issues"><img alt="GitHub issues" src="https://img.shields.io/github/issues/thejrossdev/Shiru-Extensions?style=flat-square"></a>

## Available Sources

- **aniliberty** - Aniliberty extension.

## Installation

### Add All Sources

1. Open Shiru and navigate to **Settings > Extensions > Sources**
2. Paste the following repository URL:
```
gh:thejrossdev/Shiru-Extensions
```
3. Click **Add Source**

### Add Individual Sources

You can also add sources one at a time:

| Source     | Source URL                                   |
|------------|----------------------------------------------|
| aniliberty | `gh:thejrossdev/Shiru-Extensions/aniliberty` |
